description: Growing skills/rules layer. Risk and Need & Equity agents read this BEFORE reasoning each run. The learn() step appends newly discovered patterns after every run. runs_completed and times_reinforced make the system's improvement over runs measurable, not just claimed.

rules.rule: Fresh Produce received in 'Fair' condition loses roughly 40% of its remaining safe window; apply a 0.6 condition factor to effective shelf life.
Raw Meat & Poultry has a sub-48h safe distribution window (USDA FoodKeeper). Always assign it the highest urgency tier regardless of quantity.

Deep East Oakland, West Oakland, and Fruitvale (need score >80) should be prioritized for protein and fresh produce; these neighborhoods sit well above the 11% Alameda County food-insecurity baseline.

When an agency's recent orders are >50% Bakery & Bread while its need score is >75, its order pattern has drifted away from nutritional need. Boost its produce/protein allocation rather than honoring the drifted order verbatim.
